title: Compute SHA256s of artifacts, document build exit code, and produce validation summary for native_posix BLE ingress
description: After successful build, compute sha256sum of key artifacts (zephyr/zephyr.elf, zephyr/zephyr.bin if present, logs). Record exit code. Create summary report of configuration used and any observed issues with BLE ingress paths on native_posix (no link.35.6). Update related beads.
